parameters: I've camped out all night waiting for the new xbox!
I don't care what everyone else says about you, you're great
I was looking for a volunteer to explain why there’s a
Look at all those lowborns on the other side of the barrier
This is the only spot in the building i get Wifi
Nothing like a good line to pick me up!
...yup, this side of the lobby has much better acoustics
Are you here for the new labubu collection too?
I'm not allowed in yet,\! i've got a 2pm ticket
Eeek he's going to sign the annual report!
Typical, i came here to pickpocket and the guy in front
Surely the toilets cant be this busy?
My interviewer quickly popped out to get some milk
Always put the word "suprisingly" before any compliment
I knew I should have bought an advanced ticket!
I just got kicked out the auditorium.
Management are adamant everyone is dressed appropriately for
Whats your favourite film involving centipedes?
Have you got guestlist? Else its £20 and no re-entry.
What a lovely wall, is it for sale?
Please take any deliveries to the post room.
\!Unless you're an EVRI driver, then just take the post home
Did you hear DFS has a sale on?
They'll let you put piles of fruit below the lift to squeeze
My plan is to press all the lift buttons and run
You got deeds to a house with a swimming pool!
Life's not about how you spend. It's about what you spend.
Would you mind taking a picture for my Bebo profile?
If you run at the back wall hard enough with a trolley
She goes to a different regulator
Heard the goss on the product misspelling scandal?
Wanna recreate the lobby scene from the Matrix?
The trick is to quickly follow someone through the barrier
The is where the Selfridges clairvoyant said i'd meet her.
\!Police interviews, go straight until you hear screaming.
This is the best spot in the whole building to feel the air
I preffered it when this place was a Toys R Us
This outfit? I'm a cyclist, super into all that cyclely
Are you here for the underground cycle club too?
I cant wait to cycle with someone new!
Its a long queue but it's worth it.
After the last cycle I couldnt walk for a week
(lets leave him to enjoy his apple..)
Ah a new face. Get in line and mingle.
You look great! As its your first time let me give you a
Look around for as long as you want!
Cycle club doesn't open until later.
You wont get in like that, you need cyclist gear.
Please avoid stealing any bike seats.\! I've got first dibs.
Would you like to speak to the Great Seal Statue?
So far you have found \V[2] eggs.
Looks like waits back on the menu boys!
I'm late for the board meeting!
Sorry, this revolving door is off limits until someone
This door has been apprehended on suspicion of involvement
We're out of visitor badges and temporary tatoos.
Oh wait! Are you the person interviewing for that job?
Brilliant! I was worried you wouldn't turn up.
We're out of passes but here, take mine and head upstairs.
Gather here for the lift tour, we'll be starting shortly.
This place doesn't start serving until 11am!
Do they expect me to do a bilat sober?
The lecturn in the auditorium directly above has a pipe
You look familiar...\!Did we date in high school?
Whatever you're ordering, that'll be 20 minutes.
Never too early for a game of mine sweeper!
I remember the day the old regulator dissapeared
One minute the building was there, the next it wasn't.
The executive committee... thousands of staff... never seen
There are rumours it was caused by trying to enforce rules
We're so lucky the only remaining member of the board had a
spare building and thousands of staff ready to take over
straight away, and agreed to be CEO in perpetuity.
Love is like a full moon
You only find it drunk on a friday
And it ends up being a lamppost
Know what killed the LIBORsaurs? The ICE age
I need your clothes, your boots and your business cycle.
You find a bag that probably doesnt belong to anyone,
Ooo it contains unused cycling clothes! Try them on?
You try on the cycling outfit, it's a tight fit.
Change back into your normie clothes?
You get back into your normie clothes.
You have a suddent urge to watch Hollyoaks.
Would you look at that, a bike egg!
おめでとう !!EGG をゲットしたよ！
You have 5 seconds to leave before I call your parents.
Wanna grab some popcorn and watch the static on camera 4?
You here to see our new no entry sign?
Wanna go on an escort mission back to the lobby?
The monitors may be deceptive, but this is not
Are you trespassing alone, or should I wait for the rest
So I can only stay for three pints.
WOO LOOK AT ALL THESE FREE PALLETS!
We're hoping they'll encourage people to work from the
Its a Yodel egg! It looks a bit smashed...
You're not allowed to bring kids upstairs.
\!Luckily it's only £2 to leave them in the cloakroom.
You here to help unload the new shipment of grads?
My uncle got me this job, I'm a depot baby!
What are you doing? Now my manager will find me
Leave hime alone. \!You know better than to harass a seal
When you finish the grad scheme, they stop serving your beer
You found an egg in the HVAC! Maybe the office won't smell
All the best people are born in mid June.
Want to join the Respect Party?
Your mission is to complete tasks across the 13 floors of
the main building, as well as outside!
Click to move around. Tap on people and objects to
interact with them. Most should have something to say.
Move around fast by holding down.
The game autosaves every time you use a lift or the stairs.
To check your progress, speak to the fountain in the lobby.
Now make your way to the front of the building and have fun!
I like my fruit juice like my partners
Cold and kept in the fridge?
Cold and kept in the fridge?
...I like them with a little umbrella sticking out.
A drink? I guess it is nearly 11am...
I cook Mon-Thurs, and order from the local Balkan on Fridays
You're giving pumpkin spiced latte energy
You should buy a coffee before we go into administration
My manager sent me home to change.
\!Apparently this outfit makes me look like a SEC worker.
I bought a flat there, it was built on the site of
We'll be leaving shortly for the Edinburgh office.
Next stop is the Eastside motel.
Im' writing a boring article about the seirous underlining
message of something I'm too smug to just enjoy
I'm following up on reports of a lifeless regulatory body
Looks like you're in the wrong building, walk out and follow
Go out and to the right.
Sorry I don't have any change on me, try around the corner.
I'm fine. I need to wear this bandage until the court case.
You should Pudsey the other guy.
It was a clear black night... a clear white moon...
You shouldn't go to the main office without some help!
I'll tag along in your wallet. You'll barely know I'm there.
Careful though, this penny is a bit fickle!
Use it on the menu to get hints when your stuck
It will only give helpful advice half the time!
You were gifted a new outfit!
You can equip it from the main menu.
You pat the artist on the head to support his performance.
I'm writing an article for The Sun
Whos knows beers? I knows beers.
Dont mind me, i'm here to give subtle hints.
I was a worker like you, then I took this arrow for a fee.
Looks like there's some old cardboard boxes here, take one?
Would you like to equip it now?
No problem, equip it on the main menu at any time.
No more decent boxes I'm afraid.
私は KOPIIRAITO のない国から
HURRY UP WITH MY DAMN CROISSANT
HELLO DARLING,\! ITS GOING TO BE A LATE ONE IM AFRAID.
\!CAN YOU SET UP THE VHS TO RECORD TIPPING POINT?
You stick a flyer for your etsy store on the lamp post.
You taste the lamp post.\! It reminds you of home.
You climb the lamp post, and grab a coconut from the top.
You splice the electrical wiring to charge your phone.

Would you like to post something?
You don't have any letters on you.
Would you like to use the postboxes secondary function?
You get rid of some old receipts and wrappers
Where do you see yourself in five beers time?
HEY I HAVE A SUPER WITTY JOKE YOU SHOULD PUT IN THE GAME
I never had time for relationships
I spend most of my time coming down chimneys
My ideal saturday as a Northerner?
Non-stop driving between mediocre locations in Yorkshire.
Did I mention I'm training for an ultra marathon?
Are you talented enough to walk slightly fast for 30 hours?
Last ultramarathon I listened to Coldplay's full discography
Lets find a bar so I can talk at you about how I dont drink
If I beat my PB I can be home to catch the Hollyoaks omnibus
Brilliant chat, mind if I take this made up call?
BEEP. \!SORRY I CANT TAKE YOUR CALL RIGHT NOW.
\! IM AT THE WORLD ECONOMIC CONFERENCE IN DAVROS
SUSAN CAN YOU CHECK THE CO-0RDINATES \!
I THINK WE'VE LANDED IN 1950s DRESDEN

You donate the bike\! to someone on Gumtree for £50!

and thought this building was the stadium.
Can you find them? I'll make it worth your while.
